event: Illustration from a book of portraits
description: A striking graphic illustration showing the back of a muscular male figure rendered entirely in flat red, with black line details showing body hair and musculature. The figure's hands are clasped behind the lower back, with yellow fingernails. Below the figure, a strip of blue sea and pale sky is visible at the horizon. The style is bold and graphic with minimal detail and strong color contrast.

_meta.title: 3 Illustrations for 'Killed By Roses' (A Book Of Portraits Of Yukio Mishima)
